title: montia australasica
intro: Montia australasica is a small, perennial herb in the family Montiaceae, commonly known as the native or New Zealand purslane. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Montia australasica is often made into a tea, tincture, or infusion to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
